info.title: WinEncryptedKeys
info.description: Allows storage of an encrypted secret on a windows server. Retrieval of a key can only be done from the same system that added the key using the .lib NuGet.

options.name: --name
options.description: The API Key Name to store or retrieve securely on the server system environment

options.name: --value
options.description: The API Key value to store securely on the server system environment. If not provided, the tool will output the value of the requested API Key Name. [default: 18e87946-0a88-4c26-bd7f-737fcedb65a]
